commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an OpenAI-compatible chat-completions payload guard, adjusts blank prompt skip classification for system/tool-only replay, and adds transport, prompt-helper, and compaction regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +120. Total +156 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for a source-level reproduction: current main can build and send an openai-completions payload with system prompt content but no user or assistant role. I did not run a live Qwen provider call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed for the mock-only proof gate and the global compatibility policy; no narrow automated repair is identified.

target.title: Guard OpenAI chat payload turns
target.body:
Fixes #86145

## Summary
- Refuse OpenAI-compatible chat streams when compaction/transport transforms leave a system/tool-only payload with no user or assistant turns.
- Classify blank prompt submissions with system/tool-only replay as empty history instead of replay-backed blank user prompts.
- Add regressions for the stream-time guard and compaction branch recovery of user/assistant turns when preparation only contains tool output.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Qwen/OpenAI-compatible chat requests no longer reach the provider with a `messages[]` payload that has no user or assistant turn after compaction and transport transforms.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw worktree using the OpenAI-compatible transport stream tests, prompt-build helper tests, and compaction safeguard tests.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: The new stream regression constructs a Qwen-style OpenAI-compatible chat stream with only system prompt input and observes a local error before any provider request can be made. The compaction regression verifies user and assistant branch turns are recovered when preparation contains only tool output.
Observed result after fix: OpenAI transport tests passed (386 tests); prompt helper tests passed (22 tests); compaction safeguard tests passed (180 tests); TypeScript, formatting, and whitespace checks passed.
What was not tested: No live Qwen provider call was made; the proof uses the local OpenAI-compatible stream path and compaction regression tests to verify request-shape behavior before network send.

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/openai-transport-stream.ts src/agents/openai-transport-stream.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/attempt.prompt-helpers.test.ts src/agents/pi-hooks/compaction-safeguard.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

If this PR is squashed or reworked, please preserve Andy Ye as the author or include:
Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>
